title: Japantry
description: This modpack immerses you in the Japanese atmosphere and aesthetics.
body:
### ⛩️ Overview
**Japantry Samurai's** - this is a unique vanilla modpack that can immerse you in the atmosphere of Japan. 
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c1ef77c0ae34a65244d902735ca3ee8c4a15d3a.png)
### 🏯 Lore
You are the last surviving person in this country. You will have to travel around the world, bumping into various rural villages, quiet abodes, hostile clan territories, as well as destroyed buildings. Some monsters have turned into Youkai (they are stronger and larger in size), which are very dangerous opponents. Your goal is to survive as much as possible and become the last samurai in this fallen world...
### 🎴 Features
The modpack is modified, but vanilla. The gameplay is no different from vanilla, except for the strong emphasis on Japanese aesthetics and atmosphere. This modpack can be played both alone and with friends! 

If you have any questions about the modpack, please write to my discord (tvanlegend_).
 
Enjoy and play! Good luck, samurai :)
